TransactionDescription.Description: Creates new and updates existing sales receipts in QB from OMS orders based on the Order Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS orders. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in SF from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing Opportunities and Line Items in SF from OMS orders based on the Order Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS orders. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts, sales receipts, and purchase orders in QB from Customers and Orders in OMS on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.
Creates new and updates existing Purchase Orders and Line Items in SF from OMS Orders on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.
Creates new and updates existing accounts in SF from OMS customers on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the last modification time of the orders placed by customers. It will pick up OMS Customers who placed or modified orders after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts in QB from OMS Orders based on the last modification time of the order. It will pick up OMS Orders that placed or modified after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing purchase orders in QB from OMS Orders based on the last modification time of the order. It will pick up OMS Orders that placed or modified after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the last modification time of the orders placed by customers. It will pick up OMS Customers who placed or modified orders after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.
NextOrdCust2QBAcct Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from Customers in OMS on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.

Creates new and updates existing accounts, sales receipts, and invoices in QB from Customers and Orders in OMS on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on the last modification time of the order. It will pick up OMS Orders that placed or modified after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on the last modification time of the order. It will pick up OMS Orders that placed or modified after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on the last modification time of the order. It will pick up OMS Orders that placed or modified after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on the last modification time of the order. It will pick up OMS Orders that placed or modified after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on the Order Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the last modification time of the orders placed by customers. It will pick up OMS Customers who placed or modified orders after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers from the missed customers file (result of NextAcct2QBCustCompare_A). Must run in scheduled over the interval mode. Initial Counter must be set to 0.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer Numbers interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on from the missed orders file (result of NextOrd2QBSRInvCompare_A). Must run in scheduled over the interval mode. Initial Counter must be set to 0.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the last modification time of the orders placed by customers. It will pick up OMS Customers who placed or modified orders after date and time specified. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial QueryStartTime and page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts in QB from OMS Customers based on the Customer modification timestamp interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Customers (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Customers. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on the Order modification timestamp interval. In single run mode can process no more then 15 OMS Orders (OMS limitation) per run. In scheduled over the interval mode can process any number of OMS Orders. Initial page number must be set.

Creates new and updates existing accounts, sales receipts, and invoices in QB from Customers and Orders in OMS on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.

Creates new and updates existing accounts, sales receipts, and invoices in QB from Customers and Orders in OMS on timely basis. Initial QueryStartTime must be set. Must work in scheduled over the interval mode.

Creates new and updates existing sales receipts and invoices in QB from OMS Orders based on from the missed orders file (result of NextOrd2QBSRInvCompare_A). Must run in scheduled over the interval mode. Initial Counter must be set to 0.
